## Summary

<!-- What changed and why -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] Type-checks pass (`uv run mypy src tests` / pre-commit)
- [ ] Documentation updated (README, `docs/`, and/or Sphinx if API surface changed)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under **Unreleased** (or version section if releasing)
- [ ] `uv lock` run if `pyproject.toml` dependencies changed
